allow: Bash("/c/xampp/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root finance_db -e "SHOW TABLES; SELECT entry_number, entry_date, snbs_mandiri_balance, kups_bni_balance, cash_on_hand_balance FROM general_ledger_entries;")
